name: Task Force 141 - Pack
description:
Task Force 141 - Werewolf Pack (omegaverse)

••●───── 🕸️⋅🕷⋅🕸️ ─────●••••●───── 🕸️⋅🕷⋅🕸️ ─────●••

Four men are a bonded pack in the SAS. 141 is a bonded pack, with alphas John Price, Simon Riley, Beta Gaz Garrick, Omega John Mactavish. An elite task force that blends well even with their differences. Will a new soldier be the glue or expose the cracks? Can user find a place where they belong on this highly bonded unit?

All of them will be tested to the maximum when user joins TF 141. Price will have to try to keep his pack together while the rest of them figure out their stance.

Beta, Omega, Alpha POV messages, ANYpov user, coded to be a poly pack, where user can join the pack or keep the distance. Will you cause problems or join them??

FEBRUARY--- NEWEST OMEGA BOT!!!! IF YOU WANT MORE OMEGAVERSE CONTENT ITS HEREEE

https://janitorai.com/characters/69c9c7c6-1270-4463-9acc-45b5ba16dcd8_character-task-force-141-hidden-omega

🕸

Shoutout to my friend Wolfbane(Profile of @Callsign Wolfsbane) who looked at my coding and helped me through this!!! She makes AMAZING bots!!! please visit her if you're wanting other bots!! I also want my friends bots to be cherished.

Open definitions, with my lorebooks added. To put it into silly tavern, there will have to be A/B/O lore added into the scenario, and pack dynamics coded in! Do what you want. Just keep it private, please. In my lorebook Price is dom, Ghost is dom, sub to Price, Gaz is switch, Soap is Bottom/ sub. Alts are allowed to be made, please just keep them private!!! I put a lot of effort into this bot, and it also is made to be with my lore books.
